STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-THE_TITANIC.descript: At the start of combat, add a [gold]Manipulate Distance[/gold] to your [gold]Hand[/gold]. At the start of your third turn, add a [gold]Spider Lily[/gold] to your [gold]Hand[/gold].
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-THE_TITANIC.flavor: Luxury Cruise across the Higan Shores! Limited time offer 10% off!
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-THE_TITANIC.title: The Titanic
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-COMMERCIAL_TITANIC.d: At the start of combat, add a [gold]Manipulate Distance[/gold] to your [gold]Hand[/gold] and gain {Value1} [gold]Guided Spirits[/gold]. At the start of your third turn, add a [gold]Spider Lily[/gold] to your [gold]Hand[/gold]. Whenever a non-minion enemy dies, gain {Gold} gold.
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-COMMERCIAL_TITANIC.f:
If you're saying you'll interfere with my work, I'll ferry you over with my Titanic.
50% off.
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-RED_TITANIC.descript: At the start of combat, add a [gold]Manipulate Distance[/gold] and a [gold]Spider Lily[/gold] to your [gold]Hand[/gold], then add 3 [gold]Spider Lilies[/gold] into your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold]. At the end of combat, heal HP equal to the damage you took from life loss this combat. (Heal {Heal} HP)
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-RED_TITANIC.flavor:
The chaotic blooming of the [red]red Spider Lily[/red],
is the measure of my workload.
If you're going to interfere with my work, then I'll show no mercy!
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-RED_TITANIC.title: Red Titanic
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-SHINIGAMI_EYES.descr: At the start of each combat, gain [blue]{DexterityPower}[/blue] [gold]Dexterity[/gold]. At the end of your third turn, lose [blue]{DexterityPower}[/blue] [gold]Dexterity[/gold] and apply [blue]{VulnerablePower}[/blue] [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] to ALL enemies.
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-SHINIGAMI_EYES.flavo: For half your lifespan, you can see the name and date of death of all the people you encounter.
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-SHINIGAMI_EYES.title: Shinigami Eyes
